description: Identify Major Accident Hazard (MAH) installation status under India's MSIHC Rules 1989 against the Schedule threshold quantities, and assemble the on-site emergency plan outline and safety-report outline, with PESO licensing pointers. Use it to determine MAH status, build an MSIHC on-site emergency plan, outline a safety report, or resolve India chemical storage/handling statutory duties. State detection is mandatory (ask or infer-from-address then confirm) and the state form resolves from the KB row — never a hard-coded national form; MAH thresholds and forms are [GAP]-flagged where unresolved, never invented; the OSH-Code transition is noted. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: india-msihc-mah-pack
